name: hard-gate
title: Hard Gate
description: Use this skill when a task has an explicit approval gate.
triggers: implementation must stop until a user approves a design, plan, or risky operation.
rules: Use this skill when implementation must stop until a user approves a design, plan, or risky operation.
MUST present the design before writing production code.
MUST NOT edit files before the user approves the design.
If the request involves deleting files, you MUST ask for explicit confirmation before running `rm`.
